w:r.w:t: SEASON ONE · TWELVE LEADERS · DALLAS–FORT WORTH
Website Content Export — For Design Reference
Best in B2B is a filmed leadership series. Invitation only. On location. Built for the executives who are actually building something.
Standard media captures the moment. We capture the strategy. Best in B2B is an archival project documenting the heavy-hitters who move the needle in the North Texas B2B ecosystem.
We don’t do remote calls. We don’t do audio-only. We bring a cinema-grade crew to your office or a curated studio to record the legacy of your leadership.
“The most valuable B2B insights aren’t shared on LinkedIn threads. They are shared in the quiet moments between the people actually doing the work.”
Your buyers are forming opinions about you right now. You are not in the room.
The executives your buyers trust are the ones they have seen and heard. One filmed conversation puts you in that category — permanently.
75% of B2B decision-makers research a new product after consuming leadership content. 70% reconsidered an existing supplier after seeing a competitor’s.
In a market flooded with AI-generated content, showing up on camera with original thinking is the only signal buyers cannot fake or ignore.
We film on location — your environment, your team, your company in motion. This is a portrait of how you and your organization actually operate.
Every market has a voice people default to. Best in B2B is where it gets established for DFW’s B2B community.
The executives documented now are the permanent record of this series from its beginning. That is a position, not a feature.
Minimal disruption. Our crew sets up in your office or a nearby premium venue of your choice.
An unscripted, deep-dive into the mechanics of your business and your vision for the industry.
In 2 weeks, you receive a full master episode plus high-impact shorts for your personal brand.
We handle the entire production lifecycle. You receive a complete asset library ready for distribution.
“Independent production value: $10,000 – $15,000. There is no invoice.”
We are looking for the architects of the DFW B2B landscape. Those who lead with substance over noise.
Founders, CEOs, and C-Suite Executives at established organizations or high-growth ventures.
You must be operating your primary business from the Dallas–Fort Worth metroplex.
The core of your value proposition must be business-to-business commerce or services.
We look for unique perspectives that challenge the consensus of standard business practices.
Submit your details to be considered for Season One.
Invitations are sent on a rolling basis.
Everything you need to know about the series.
How do you choose the leaders?
We select only 12 leaders per season to ensure high production value and narrative depth. We prioritize contrast across industries within the B2B space.
What is the timeline from approval to filming?
From approval to filming, the window is typically 3 weeks. We handle all logistics, including lighting, audio, and post-production.
The show is backed by a coalition of North Texas investment groups and business media outlets seeking to elevate the region’s B2B profile.
Every guest receives full usage rights to the 4K episode, raw transcripts, and a library of 10+ social-ready vertical clips for their teams.
Join the waitlist for Season 2 — Email input + submit arrow
© 2024 Best in B2B Leadership Series. Curated by DFW.
